The '''''Pride of Thela''''' was a [[Space Rescue Corps/Legends|Space Rescue Corps]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]], flown by [[Uldir Lochett]] until his partner, the [[Peace Brigade]] agent [[Dacholder]], tried to betray him to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
